rule.title: Server Action files must start with `'use server'` directive (R20)

check.selector: Program:not(Program:has(ExpressionStatement:first-child > Literal[value='use server'])) ExportNamedDeclaration > FunctionDeclaration[async=true], Program:not(Program:has(ExpressionStatement:first-child > Literal[value='use server'])) ExportDefaultDeclaration > FunctionDeclaration[async=true]
check.message: Server Action file must start with 'use server' directive at the top of the file (R20).

examples.good:
'use server';
export async function action() { return 1; }
